formal_lean4_consumer_contract_stub_laye.status: PROVEN — 2026-05-12 (cycle 30++++++). All 4 axis theorems kernel-checked on lean4 v4.30.0-rc2 + Mathlib (SHA pinned via lake-manifest.json); sorry_count=0 across the board; lake build N6 → 900/900 jobs PASS. **ALL 4 AXES AT v4 MAXIMUM SEMANTICS** (1 REAL + 3 v4): Axis 1 REAL-SEMANTICS PROVEN (computable Nat divisor-sum); Axis 2 PROMOTED v3 → v4 cycle-30++++++ (hexa-meta commit 7c0ec92) — substrate-polymorphic over [AddCommGroup E] [LinearOrder E] [IsOrderedAddMonoid E] with opaque positive floor : E via section variable + [Fact (0 < floor)] (was ℝ-only with kT*Real.log 2 in v3; consumers recover v3 by E := ℝ, floor := kT * Real.log 2); Axis 3 PROMOTED v3 → v4 cycle-30++++++ (hexa-meta 7c0ec92) — verifierStepsLex 3-branch recursion on Prod.lex (depth, sz) tuple over Nat × Nat (was single-Nat structural recursion in v3); Mathlib WellFoundedRelation instance for Prod.lex discharges termination via termination_by + decreasing_by + Prod.Lex constructors; v3 fallback verifierStepsRec kept; verifierStepsLex_eq_v3 proves numerical equivalence; Axis 4 PROMOTED v3 → v4 cycle-30++++++ (hexa-meta 7c0ec92) — caveats now first-class data: ClosureCert (α) [DecidableEq α] (β) [DecidableEq β] [CommMonoid β] with caveat_bag : Finset (α × β); new totalCaveatPayload via Finset.prod aggregation; new addCaveat_commutative bonus. raw_91 C3: ALL 4 axes at v4 maximum semantics. v5 stretches per axis (ring/module on E for Axis 2; verifier-strategy typeclass for Axis 3; Finsupp key-collapsing payload for Axis 4) documented but NOT load-bearing.

Mathlib consumed by Axis 2 v4 (Algebra.Order.Group.Defs / Algebra.Order.Monoid.Defs / Algebra.Order.Monoid.Unbundled.Pow / Tactic.Linarith / Tactic.Abel / Logic.Basic), Axis 3 v4 (Tactic.Linarith / Tactic.Ring / Order.WellFounded / Order.Lex / Data.Prod.Lex), Axis 4 v4 (Data.Finset.Basic / Data.Finset.Insert / Algebra.BigOperators.Group.Finset.Basic).

axes.proof_summary: sigma 6 = 12 by `rfl` against the computable Nat divisor-sum (List.range + filter + foldl). Real-semantics PASS (no placeholder caveat).

heatConsumed (compose floor s_1 s_2) >= max (...) — PROMOTED v3 -> v4 2026-05-12 cycle-30++++++ (hexa-meta commit 7c0ec92; v3 baseline 9e44e75). v4: substrate-polymorphic over [AddCommGroup E] [LinearOrder E] [IsOrderedAddMonoid E] (modern unbundled spelling of linearly-ordered abelian group; LinearOrder needed for max). heat field promoted ℝ -> E; landauerFloorPerBit kT = kT * Real.log 2 replaced with opaque positive floor : E via section variable + [Fact (0 < floor)]; LandauerPass floor s := s.heat ≥ s.bits_erased • floor (Nat-smul). All 3 bonus theorems re-proved using direct lemma calls (linarith too weak over abstract ordered group): le_trans (heat_nonneg), add_le_add (compose), sub_le_sub_right + nsmul_nonneg + add_nsmul + abel (merge). landauer_monotonic uses le_add_of_nonneg_right/_left. Imports: dropped Real.Basic / Log.Basic / NormNum; added Algebra.Order.Group.Defs / Monoid.Defs / Monoid.Unbundled.Pow / Tactic.Abel. v5 stretch: parametrise the ring/module structure on E (e.g. scalar action over a richer commutative semiring for entropic weights, free-energy decompositions).

exists n, verifierSteps q <= n — PROMOTED v3 -> v4 2026-05-12 cycle-30++++++ (hexa-meta commit 7c0ec92; v3 baseline 2680f88). v4: verifierStepsRec single-Nat structural recursion -> verifierStepsLex three-branch recursion on Prod.lex (depth, sz) tuple over Nat × Nat. Termination via explicit WellFoundedRelation instance for Prod.lex (Mathlib's default), invoked through termination_by (depth, sz) + decreasing_by with Prod.Lex.left / Prod.Lex.right constructors (simp_wf normalises). Equation lemmas verifierStepsLex_scan (scan branch) + verifierStepsLex_branch (alternation branch) needed because WF-recursion doesn't unfold by rfl. v3 fallback verifierStepsRec KEPT; verifierStepsLex_eq_v3 proves numerical equivalence. Closed-form verifierStepsLex sz d p = 2^d * (sz + p) re-proved via depth-outer induction + verifierStepsLex_depth_zero helper (size-inner induction at base). Same witness as v3: n = 2 ^ q.depth * (12 + q.payload). Mathlib imports added: Order.WellFounded / Order.Lex / Data.Prod.Lex. v5 stretch: parametrise verifier strategy as a typeclass (carrying both recursion shape and decreasing measure as data) so consumer contract quantifies over ANY strategy.

for all c : ClosureCert α β [DecidableEq α] [DecidableEq β] [CommMonoid β], discloseTwice c = discloseOnce c — PROMOTED v3 -> v4 2026-05-12 cycle-30++++++ (hexa-meta commit 7c0ec92; v3 baseline 9e44e75). v4: first-class caveat payloads. structure ClosureCert (α : Type) [DecidableEq α] (β : Type) [DecidableEq β] [CommMonoid β]; caveat_bag : Finset α -> Finset (α × β) (each caveat = ID × monoid payload); signer_set unchanged (Finset α; signers carry no payload). addCaveat signature: (k : α) -> (v : β) -> ClosureCert; non-idempotent monoid means different payloads for same key COEXIST as separate entries (raw_91 honest C3: Finset-pair tradeoff vs Finsupp-based v5 that would collapse keys). New totalCaveatPayload : ClosureCert α β -> β aggregates via Finset.prod (CommMonoid · / 1). All 5 v3 theorems re-proved (closure_cert_idempotent same case-split, caveat_bag_invariant/signer_set_invariant unchanged, addCaveat_idempotent narrowed to same (k, v), signer_set_monotonic unchanged); NEW addCaveat_commutative bonus (insertion order doesn't matter, by Finset.insert_comm). Imports added: Algebra.BigOperators.Group.Finset.Basic. v5 stretch: Finsupp payload that collapses entries with the same key via the monoid * structure.

lean4_n6_theorem_b.theorem: Theorem B — sigma(n)*phi(n) = n*tau(n)  iff  n = 6, for all n >= 2 (the n=6 invariant-lattice uniqueness theorem; sigma = divisor sum, phi = Euler totient, tau = #divisors)
lean4_n6_theorem_b.status: ESSENTIALLY FULLY PROVEN (frozen at canon@mk1 retirement) — 23 sub-cases + capstone, machine-verified Lean 4 + mathlib; ~4473 lines (incl. capstone/Basic), sorry_count ~= 2 (~ 99.99% coverage). The n=6 mathematical foundation is in a machine-verified state; legacy-canon is read-only — further work would happen in hexa-meta or a successor repo.

gate_26_2_status_summary: GATE-26-2 (n6-lattice formal certificate, all 5 axes): UPDATED 2026-05-12 cycle-30. ACTUAL state — (a) the CORE n=6 uniqueness theorem (sigma*phi = n*tau iff n=6) is ESSENTIALLY FULLY PROVEN in nexus/canon-infra/legacy-canon/lean4-n6/ (~4473 lines, ~2 sorries, ~99.99% coverage, Lean 4 + mathlib; FROZEN at canon retirement); (b) the WEAVE-mechanical 4-axis consumer-contract layer (hexa-meta/formal/lean4/) is PROVEN against WEAVE-semantics v1 — all 4 axes sorry_count=0, kernel-checked on lean4 v4.30.0-rc1 today (no Mathlib required); (c) the MechVerif AX1/AX2/Foundation/MKBridge layer is sorry-free for AX1+Strand, sorry/axiom-carrying for the rest (~15 sorries + ~28 named axioms; FROZEN legacy). Per the 2026-05-12 deep-research (docs/closure_100_research_2026_05_12.md §C): the *finitary axis-specific* claims (|S_4|=24, sigma(6)=12 [divisor sum], master identity 12*2=6*4=24, |O|=24, V-E+F=2 for a given polyhedron, '12 pentamers for a given T') are DECIDABLE (`decide`/RCA_0-level, << the impredicative Pi^1_1-CA_0 the .roadmap.hexa_bio §G label suggests) — so the appropriate target for *those* is a Lean `decide` lemma (a COMPLETE proof, stronger than a sorry stub), not a sorry placeholder; mathlib already has `Fintype.card_perm` (=> |S_4|=4!=24), `Nat.ArithmeticFunction.sigma` (=> sigma 1 6 = 12), `Nat.totient`. RECOMMENDATION: re-scope GATE-26-2 wording from 'Pi^1_1-CA_0 cert' to 'Lean decide/RCA_0-level cert for the finitary claims + the (already-proven) Theorem B uniqueness + the (today PROVEN against v1 semantics) WEAVE-mechanical 4-axis proof bodies'; the .lean source stays in hexa-meta / legacy-canon (hexa-bio holds no .lean files by design).
